description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is not logged in

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a game tile
AND assigns focus to the not entitled feed
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "<away_team> @ <home_team>, <button_name/feed_name>, <feed_type>, Not Entitled, press <appropriate_directions> for more content. Press back to dismiss."
